title: hud's chat formatting
description: this plugin is the jack of all trades for chat formatting it is super customizable and can look amazing.
body:
this plugin focuses on being the best chat formatting plugin here are it's features:

able to format sent messages with placeholders(can hook into placholderAPI but not required)
ex: &3[{time}] {prefix}&f{display_name}&7: {message} translates to: [12:00] [member]hudson: hi

has a fully customizable chat filter to block messages with a keyword or replace a keyword with a word/phrase, and can be bypassed with a permission or by having operator.

Can fully customize certain join, leave, death, and advancement messages

Has many commands for easy configuration

/speak to speak as other players with your custom format (supports command blocks)
## Velocity integration
- need the plugin on every desired server + velocity
- allows for global chat (enabled/disabled in config)
- allows for full server network chat filtering
- {server} placeholder and can change how each server looks in velocity's huds chat formatting config.


players with your specified permissions (hudschatformatting.chat.format and hudschatformatting.chat.color by default) will be able to use & coloring and formatting in their messages.
